## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] If adding a new reference: linked it from `SKILL.md` index table
- [ ] If adding a new example: tested it works (or marked untested with reason)
- [ ] If editing `SKILL.md`: kept it < 200 lines and language-agnostic
- [ ] Updated both `README.md` (Chinese) and `README.en.md` (English) if user-facing
- [ ] No real secrets, appids, or private keys included
- [ ] Followed the [style guide](./CONTRIBUTING.md#style-guide)
